properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Bless my life, take away the shame, Allow me to experience your most amazing grace, You fill my heart, it's empty and frail, Make me whole again Lord, mend my broken soul.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I Offer my life to you Lord, With all my strength, I worship you.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I give my all (take me as I am) And I'm yours Oh God (lead me to your arms) And I give you praise (I rejoice in you) Till the end of my days I give my all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You gave your all, unworthy as I am You have died for me, Lord, and now I am free Your the only reason, why my heart leaps for joy I give you back the glory, Lord, mold me and use me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Till the end of my days I give my all (3x) … .. to you.
